pages.text: A sealed sandstone chamber with four treasure chests — and a hidden 3×3 cache of $(item)TNT$() buried in the floor beneath them. Break in from above and loot the chests; mine the TNT out from the side if you want it.
$(bold)The haul$()$(br)Vanilla desert-pyramid loot: diamonds, gold, emerald, enchanted books, a golden apple — plus nine TNT for the taking. Keep open flame well away from that floor.
Crafted from $(item)sand$(), $(item)sandstone$() and $(item)TNT$() — the TNT a fair warning of what's inside.
